title: The Postmaster's Archives
content: Nori has been Springtown's postmaster for 42 years, inheriting the position from Mr. Yamamoto. His post office, located between Hana's tea shop and the town square, maintains a collection of undelivered letters dating back decades - love letters, apologies, and confessions that people wrote but never sent. Notable items in the collection include a letter from Professor Tanaka to her sister, a young musician's unsent confession, and decades of correspondence between Springtown residents. Nori is known for his ability to hold letters until 'the world is ready' for them, and has reportedly facilitated several reconciliations through careful timing of deliveries. He maintains correspondence relationships with many Springtown residents and is considered the town's unofficial historian.
